---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem;">
  <div class="section-label">Get in touch</div>
  <h1>Contact</h1>
  <hr class="neon-rule">
</section>
```

```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; padding-bottom: 5rem; align-items: start;">

  <div>
    <p style="font-size:1.05rem; color:#e2e2e2; line-height: 1.9; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
      I'm always open to conversations about data, analytics, projects,
      or opportunities. Whether you're a recruiter, a potential collaborator,
      or a fellow student, feel free to reach out.
    </p>

    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;">

      <a href="mailto:raunit.budhiraja@mail.dcu.ie" class="project-card" style="text-decoration:none;">
        <div class="card-tag">Email</div>
        <h3 style="font-size: 0.95rem;">raunit.budhiraja@mail.dcu.ie</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem;">Fastest way to reach me. I typically reply within 24 hours.</p>
      </a>

      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/raunit-budhiraja-980595203/" target="_blank" class="project-card" style="text-decoration:none;">
        <div class="card-tag">LinkedIn</div>
        <h3 style="font-size: 0.95rem;">linkedin.com/in/raunitbudhiraja</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem;">Connect professionally — I'm open to networking in analytics and tech.</p>
      </a>

      <a href="https://github.com/raunitbudhiraja02" target="_blank" class="project-card" style="text-decoration:none;">
        <div class="card-tag">GitHub</div>
        <h3 style="font-size: 0.95rem;">github.com/raunitbudhiraja</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem;">Where all the code for this portfolio and other projects lives.</p>
      </a>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div>
    <div style="background: #14141f; border: 1px solid #252535; border-radius: 12px; padding: 2rem;">
      <div class="section-label" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Currently</div>

      <div class="timeline">
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="tl-date">2025 – Present</div>
          <h3>Final Year, BSc Business Analytics</h3>
          <p>Dublin City University</p>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="tl-date">Looking for</div>
          <h3>Summer Internship / Graduate Role</h3>
          <p>Data analyst, business analyst, or junior data science roles in Ireland or remote.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="tl-date">Interests</div>
          <h3>Python · ML · BI · Strategy</h3>
          <p>Especially interested in companies where analytics sits close to product decisions.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
        <a href="cv/raunit_cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-neon" style="width:100%; justify-content:center;">
          Download CV (PDF) →
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
